/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/datastructs/Complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/datastructs/String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_dynamic_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_stack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_string.cpp.o -o run_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
